positive: A minimalist, geometric design illustration featuring a stylized bouquet of wildflowers and lush greenery. The flora should be rendered using clean, thick black outlines against a stark, off-white background. Focus on negative space and strong silhouettes. The arrangement should be centered and balanced, evoking a whimsical, natural, yet modern aesthetic. Use only two accent colors: muted sage green and dusty lavender. The composition must be highly scalable and suitable for screen printing or direct-to-garment printing, with crisp lines and flat color fills. Vector art quality, engraved line work, botanical illustration style, high contrast, clean composition, symmetrical balance.
negative: blurry, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, logo, text, realistic, photo, 3d render, low contrast, noisy
